testcase.name: verifyTitle
testcase.system-out: Cookie pop up not found The page title is:Google
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.
